attachments.fallback: Migrate Google Drive to OneDrive while keeping the file permission - @Emilia
attachments.text: In that case, I suggest a professional tool developed by gurusquad called Gs Richcopy 360 Googledrive/OneDrive Migration Tool, which helps to transfer files from Googledrive to OneDrive with keeping permissions. This utility can quickly transfer files from Googledrive to OneDrive ,  regardless of the file type within it. It is a time-saving, reliable, and advanced utility.
attachments.title: Migrate Google Drive to OneDrive while keeping the file permission [How-to Discussions]
